summary: Comprehensive testing of 12EN12 fitness platform completed. Backend API shows 91.7% success rate (22/24 tests passed). Frontend flows including auth, onboarding, and admin panel working correctly. Minor issues identified with AI routine generation and some frontend content loading.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when generating AI routines
flaky_endpoints.impact: Admin cannot generate AI-powered routines for clients

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard cards with data-testid attributes not rendering in main content area
Main content area appears empty despite navigation working

issues: Admin panel has excellent design and functionality

passed_tests: API health check and plans endpoint
All client profile operations (create, get, update)
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix AI routine generation endpoint - likely Claude API integration issue or LLM key problem. 2. Investigate client dashboard main content rendering - cards with data-testids not appearing in main area despite navigation working. 3. Check nutrition page content loading issue.
success_percentage: Backend: 91.7% (22/24 tests), Frontend Navigation: 95%, Admin Panel: 100%
